description: Visible, named parts of components as defined by designers. These are the parts called out in component specification diagrams. Styling surfaces (background, border, etc.) belong in token-objects.json; positional terms (top, bottom, etc.) belong in positions.json.

values.label: Control
values.description: Interactive control elements like checkboxes or radio buttons

values.label: Track
values.description: Track or rail element (e.g., in sliders)

values.label: Title
values.description: Title text element within a component

values.label: Description
values.description: Descriptive text element within a component

values.label: Step
values.description: Individual step element in a step list or wizard

values.label: Preview
values.description: Preview area or thumbnail within a component

values.label: Media
values.description: Media container (image, video) within a component

values.label: Field
values.description: Input container element in form components (text-field, number-field, combo-box, picker, etc.)

values.label: Fill
values.description: Active/completed portion of a track-based component (slider, meter, progress-bar, progress-circle)

values.label: Value
values.description: Displayed data value within a component (numeric readout, selected text, menu item value)

values.label: Container
values.description: Outer wrapper element of a component (cards, swatch, thumbnail, avatar)

values.label: Loupe
values.description: Magnified color preview element in color components (color-area, color-slider, color-wheel)

values.label: Checkmark
values.description: Check or confirmation icon element within a component

values.label: Illustration
values.description: Decorative or explanatory illustration within a component

values.label: Heading
values.description: Heading text element within a component section

values.label: Focus Ring
values.description: Visible ring drawn around a focused component for accessibility

values.label: Focus Indicator
values.description: Visual indicator showing keyboard focus state on a component

values.label: Workflow Icon
values.description: Standard workflow icon element within a component (distinct from UI icons)

values.label: UI Icon
values.description: System UI icon element (chevrons, checkmarks, close icons) within a component
